content.en:
The Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal is so precious, not only is it useful to the Supreme Ancestor, but it can even create a Supreme Ancestor.

Therefore, once the powerhouse of the Exotic Land heard the news of the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, he would naturally snatch it at all costs.

At this time.

Ye Tian also got the news, and with a thought, he traveled through time and space and came here.

When he came here, a powerful foreign powerhouse had already arrived.

At this time, a number of supreme-level Exotic powerhouses were besieging an Exotic powerhouse, and it was obviously the other party who had seized the body of that top-notch holy beast.

Under the siege of many supreme-level Exotic powerhouses, this Exotic powerhouse was seriously injured.

But at this time, two Exotic Exotic Strongmen descended, one of them reached the second level of the Extreme Level, and the three Exotic Strongmen resisted the siege of the other Extreme Powers.

"One step too late!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

He was about the same strength as that second-level supreme powerhouse in an exotic realm, so he couldn't kill the opponent, so he couldn't snatch the opponent's Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

Soon, the three exotic powerhouses fled, and the other exotic powerhouses did not chase and kill, because they all knew that there was little hope, unless it was more than two third-level powerhouses who made a move, there was hope to stop them, otherwise they would definitely be able to escape back to the base in a short time and send the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal back to their own exotic world.

The first Origin Rule Robbery Crystal was not snatched in his hands, and Ye Tian was not surprised at all.

His strength is not to the extent of sweeping everything, and it is normal that he can't snatch it.

However, through this experience, he had a general understanding of the strength of these exotic powerhouses.

Most of the supreme-level exotic powerhouses are only comparable to the first-level supreme ancestor, and there are very few exotic powerhouses like the second-level supreme ancestor, only about one-tenth, and the third-level supreme ancestor has not seen a single such powerhouse yet.

Perhaps among the many exotic worlds, the powerhouses of the third level of the strongest ancestor level are extremely rare, and they are all working hard to impact the invincible ancestor level, and they may not necessarily come to participate.

The foreign force corresponding to the only second-order gate in the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth may have a powerhouse at the third-level Supreme Ancestor level, but the other party may not necessarily send it over.

Without a powerhouse of the level of the Third Order Supreme Ancestor, Ye Tian was not so worried.

What he was most worried about was the appearance of a powerhouse at the level of an invincible ancestor, so he didn't want to compete for an Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

......

Sanctuary Heaven and Earth, Blood Mist Forbidden Land.

This is the only forbidden place where the second-order gate of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth is located, and it was established by the Blood Mist Alliance, an alien force.

The Blood Mist Alliance is actually not a single force, but is composed of multiple forces, strictly speaking, it is composed of some forces of the Blood Mist Heaven and Earth, specifically to attack some exotic worlds.

This kind of alliance is actually difficult to form, such as the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, and the three major Holy Sects will not unite, after all, they can open their own doors and enter other foreign worlds to plunder resources, there is no need to unite.

After all, the powerhouses who have reached the level of the Supreme Ancestor are very arrogant and will not unite easily.

But the Blood Mist Alliance has united, combining the power of an entire heaven and earth, and naturally there are real powerhouses suppressing it, so they are very united, otherwise they would have calculated each other in one mission after another, causing the alliance to collapse.

The Blood Mist Alliance is terrifying, so the three major Holy Sects of the Holy Land Heaven and Earth, as well as some other foreign forces, will basically unite against the Blood Mist Alliance.

Otherwise, the Blood Mist Alliance would have destroyed the three major holy sects, as well as the bases of other foreign forces, and occupied all the Origin Rule Robbery Crystals.

But this time, the Blood Mist Alliance didn't send many exotic powerhouses, such as the battle for the first Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, they didn't pay much attention.

If someone comes here, they will find that there are a lot of supreme level exotic powerhouses gathered here.

In the blood-colored mist, one after another figures sat on the throne, and there were about dozens of figures, all of them were at the level of the strongest ancestor, and many of them were second-level powerhouses.

Abrupt.

Bang!!!!

A terrifying figure emerged, surpassing the second level and reaching the third level, infinitely close to the level of the invincible ancestor.

"I've seen Lord White Turtle!"

"I've seen Lord White Turtle!"

"I've seen Lord White Turtle!"

An exotic powerhouse stood up and said respectfully.

The White Turtle True Emperor, one of the three deputy alliance leaders of the Blood Mist Alliance, and the third level of the Supreme True Emperor.

The True Emperor corresponds to the level of the ancestors, which is their title.

The True Emperor of the Supreme is the ancestor of the Supreme Force, but the name is different, and the road is almost the same.

The White Turtle True Emperor looked at the many True Emperors and said, "Our Blood Mist Alliance has completely digested another Exotic Heaven and Earth, and has destroyed all the doors of the Non-Blood Mist Alliance, and has 100% control over that Exotic Heaven and Earth, and now our Blood Mist Alliance has enough strength to invade the Holy Land and Earth." This Sanctuary Heaven and Earth has passed the novice period, unlike some nascent exotic worlds, under the protection of the rules, we can't completely transform it, but the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth don't have this problem, once we completely control this place, we can start to transform it, so that this piece of heaven and earth can adapt to our Blood Mist Alliance. At that time, our Blood Mist Alliance will have one more Exotic World. "

"Lord White Turtle, when are we going to do it?" asked one of the Supreme True Emperors.

"Let's wait, when the origin of the Holy Domain Heaven and Earth is weak in the later stage of the Great Tribulation, it will be easy for us to try to transform the Holy Domain Heaven and Earth, and wait for them to kill more creatures and empty the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth for us, so we are not in a hurry to make a move. None of these forces have a third-level Supreme True Emperor powerhouse, and once I make a move, they won't be able to stop it at all. Moreover, after a while, there will be a third-level Supreme True Emperor coming, combined with two third-level Supreme True Emperors, plus more than ten second-level Supreme True Emperors, no force will be able to compete with us!"

"Yes!"

Many Supreme True Emperors responded one by one.

At this time, the other foreign forces, as well as the local supreme holy beasts of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, were not necessarily the ambitions of the Blood Mist Alliance, and were still looking for the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

Ye Tian didn't know about the Blood Mist Alliance, but even if he knew, he wouldn't worry about anything.

After all, no matter how bad the situation is, the Blood Mist Alliance can't invade the Dark Forbidden Realm at the moment.

Moreover, with his progress speed, by the time of the Dark Forbidden Domain Tribulation, he might have advanced to the third level of the Supreme Ancestor, and he was not afraid of the Blood Mist Alliance at all.

In the blink of an eye, billions of years passed, and the second Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal appeared.
